headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 9 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 9 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 1 critical, 16 high, 16 medium, 6 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Timişoara Traian Vuia (TSR/LRTR); plus 14 other bases. 16 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and low cloud base  — most notably around Vilnius (VNO/EYVI), Václav Havel Airport Prague (PRG/LKPR) and London Luton (LTN/EGGW). Network hotspots: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Billund (BLL/EKBI), Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY), Vilnius (VNO/EYVI) and 4 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, mist and cold‑temperature performance penalties. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Birmingham (BHX/EGBB) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 9 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Timişoara Traian Vuia (TSR/LRTR) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; strong gusts risk | Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Craiova (CRA/LRCV) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 100 ft and 11 others. Worst affected now: Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Billund (BLL/EKBI) — CRIT: mist; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, mist) | Olsztyn-Mazury (SZY/EPSY) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; cloud base around 200 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Vilnius (VNO/EYVI) — CRIT: freezing fog; snow; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: approach minima limits, cold-temperature performance penalties, very low visibility) | Bologna Guglielmo Marconi (BLQ/LIPE) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints, very low visibility) and 3 others. Changed since last run: London Luton (LTN/EGGW), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD), Birmingham (BHX/EGBB), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK), Aberdeen (ABZ/EGPD), Liverpool John Lennon (LPL/EGGP), David the Builder Kutaisi (KUT/UGKO), Mohammed V (CMN/GMMN), Poprad-Tatry (TAT/LZTT), Palanga (PLQ/EYPA) and 2 others.
